Title: About Me
Introduction: I'm Dylan. On this page, you'll find out more about me, my skills, education, and interests.
EducationText: I studied software development at ROC of Twente and learned a lot about programming languages, frameworks, and software development in general.
SkillsText: I have experience with JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and .NET. I'm also familiar with database management and version control systems like Git. Additionally, I'm interested in Linux and use it daily.
InterestsText: I'm particularly interested in privacy and security, especially given the current global situation with data collection, monetization, and AI training without consent. This drives my interest in Linux and open-source software as alternatives to big tech companies like Google, Microsoft, Apple, Meta, Amazon, and Twitter.
HobbiesText: In my free time, I enjoy playing video games, particularly city builders and strategy games.
